prompt_text: Recommended AI tooling tools for AI engineers at startups and enterprises building LLM applications companies
response:
# AI Tooling for LLM Application Development

## **Core Development & Fine-tuning**

| Tool | Best For | Tier |
|------|----------|------|
| **LangChain / LlamaIndex** | LLM orchestration & RAG pipelines | Open Source |
| **Hugging Face** | Model access, fine-tuning, inference | Free + Paid |
| **OpenAI API / Anthropic** | Proprietary model access | Paid |
| **vLLM / Text Generation WebUI** | Local model serving, optimization | Open Source |
| **Replicate** | Model hosting & versioning | Paid (affordable) |

## **Prompt Engineering & Testing**

| Tool | Best For | Tier |
|------|----------|------|
| **Promptfoo** | Prompt testing & comparison | Open Source |
| **LangSmith** | Development & debugging workflows | Paid |
| **Pydantic AI** | Structured outputs & validation | Open Source |
| **OpenAI Playground / Claude Console** | Quick experimentation | Free |

## **Evaluation & Observability**

| Tool | Best For | Tier |
|------|----------|------|
| **Weights & Biases** | Experiment tracking | Free + Paid |
| **Arize / Evidently AI** | Model monitoring & drift detection | Paid |
| **Ragas** | RAG evaluation metrics | Open Source |
| **DeepEval** | LLM-as-judge evaluations | Open Source |
| **Braintrust** | Evals & observability | Paid |

## **Vector Databases & Retrieval**

| Tool | Best For | Tier |
|------|----------|------|
| **Pinecone** | Managed vector search | Paid |
| **Weaviate** | Open-source vector DB | Open Source + Managed |
| **Milvus** | High-scale vector search | Open Source |
| **Postgres + pgvector** | Lightweight, SQL-integrated | Open Source |
| **Chroma** | Simple embeddings store | Open Source |

## **Data Processing & ETL**

| Tool | Best For | Tier |
|------|----------|------|
| **Apache Airflow** | Workflow orchestration | Open Source |
| **Unstructured.io** | Document parsing & chunking | Open Source + Paid |
| **Argilla** | Data labeling & curation | Open Source |
| **Cleanlab** | Data quality improvement | Open Source + Paid |

## **Inference & Deployment**

| Tool | Best For | Tier |
|------|----------|------|
| **Modal** | Serverless function deployment | Paid |
| **Fly.io / Railway** | Full-stack app hosting | Paid (affordable) |
| **AWS SageMaker / GCP Vertex** | Enterprise ML ops | Paid |
| **Together AI / Baseten** | Inference endpoints | Paid |
| **NVIDIA Triton** | High-performance serving | Open Source |

## **Agent Frameworks**

| Tool | Best For | Tier |
|------|----------|------|
| **AutoGen** | Multi-agent systems | Open Source |
| **Crew AI** | Role-based agent teams | Open Source |
| **LangGraph** | Agentic workflows & control flow | Open Source |
| **Voiceflow / Mem0** | Stateful agent memory | Paid |

## **Cost Optimization & Analytics**

| Tool | Best For | Tier |
|------|----------|------|
| **Helicone / Humanloop** | API monitoring & cost tracking | Paid |
| **LiteLLM** | Multi-provider LLM abstraction | Open Source |
| **Outlines** | Token-efficient structured generation | Open Source |

## **Quality Assurance**

| Tool | Best For | Tier |
|------|----------|------|
| **Pytest** | Unit testing | Open Source |
| **Chainlit / Streamlit** | Quick UI prototyping | Open Source |
| **Cypress / Playwright** | End-to-end testing | Open Source |

---

## **Recommended Startup Stack** 🚀
